17906.title: CNN Newsroom Saturday
17906.description: Updates of the latest news from around the world.

17907.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
17907.description: Stanley Tucci eats and drinks his way around Milan, enjoying an aperitivo, feels inspired to make pizzoccheri, and enjoys classic Milanese - veal chops and risotto.

17908.title: Inside Africa
17908.description: From superbikes to racecars, some of South Africa's fastest men and women on wheels provide an inside look at what life is like on, and off, the track.

17909.title: African Voices Changemakers
17909.description: A Kenyan producer is on a mission to make the superhero genre more inclusive; the visionary behind the South Africa's first superhero comic book series.

17910.title: Africa Avant Garde
17910.description: We hear from some of the continent's most experimental contemporary artists, including acclaimed Nigerian visual artist Victor Ehikhamenor.

17911.title: Marketplace Africa
17911.description: A look at the contemporary African art market; given the wide range of applications, satellites are part of the solution when it comes to solving the connectivity gap in Africa.

17912.title: Marketplace Africa
17912.description: Kenya's apparel sector localizes its supply chain and the role of Kenya-based textile manufacturers; African designers looking for success internationally face unique hurdles.

17913.title: CNN Newsroom with Michael Holmes
17913.description: Live from Atlanta, Michael Holmes brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

17914.title: Connecting Africa
17914.description: From the CEO of a massive energy company in South Africa and fruit exporters in Egypt to the man who bought a bank in Nigeria, we look at all aspects of doing business in Africa.

17920.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
17920.description: Stanley Tucci explores his former home, Tuscany, with a wine bar crawl, celebrating the importance of the lowly loaf and samples dishes which use stale bread as the key ingredient.

17921.title: Inside Politics
17921.description: An insider's look into the key stories of the week from John King and a group of America's top political reporters.

17922.title: State of the Union with Jake Tapper
17922.description: Jake Tapper brings together major news makers, analysts and experts to tackle pressing domestic issues and diplomacy on the global stage.

17923.title: Fareed Zakaria GPS
17923.description: Fareed Zakaria GPS takes a comprehensive look at foreign affairs and the policies shaping our world.
